name: stray-plugin
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for reusable agent skills and focused specialist workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Codex plugin workspace for skill authoring and focused workflow skills.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local Codex plugin that bundles skills for creating, reviewing, and operating Codex agent skills, plus focused workflow skills for current web research, research-backed product design, JSON Canvas editing, MCP server design, screenshot capture, Slack GIF creation, web content distillation, artifact theming, context compression, multi-agent workflow design, and AI eval quality gates.
defaultPrompt: Create a new Codex skill in this plugin.
Research a current topic on the web and return a concise sourced brief.
Design a product direction or feature brief using current web research.
Find existing skills before creating a new one.
Review a SKILL.md for trigger quality and scope.
Plan validation cases for a new or updated skill.
Compress a long-running task without losing file paths, decisions, or next steps.
Design a multi-agent workflow with clear handoffs and quality gates.
Add AI or agent evals to CI so regressions fail the build.
Triage GitHub maintenance work and recommend the next actions.
Update a skill to use instruction-first best practices.
Create or edit a JSON Canvas .canvas file safely.
Plan or review an MCP server before implementation.
Capture polished product screenshots for docs or launch assets.
Make a Slack-friendly animated GIF from screenshots or images.
Strip clutter from a web page and return clean markdown.
Apply a coherent visual theme to an existing artifact.
